---
name: Classification error
about: Report a misclassified post or comment
title: "[CLASSIFICATION] "
labels: classification-error
assignees: ""
---

## Content item

- **Key:** `ig:...` or `tt:...`
- **Platform:** Instagram / TikTok
- **URL:** link to original post
- **Item type:** post / comment

## Automated prediction

- **Decision:** relevant / not relevant / needs review
- **Category:** campaign_or_partnership / legacy_throwback / etc.
- **Confidence:** 0.xx
- **Reason:** (from automated field)

## Human decision

- **Correct decision:** relevant / not relevant
- **Correct category:** (if different)
- **Evidence:** what did you see that the model missed?

## Media completeness

- Was media actually inspected? [ ] yes [ ] no
- What was inspected? [ ] caption only [ ] cover image [ ] full carousel [ ] full video [ ] audio

## Agent context (if AI-authored)

- **Agent:** name (model)
- **Session:** timestamp
